Package org.eventb.core.tool

Interface IProcessorModule

All Superinterfaces:
IModule
All Known Subinterfaces:
IPOGProcessorModule, ISCProcessorModule
All Known Implementing Classes:
AssignmentModule, BaseModule, BaseModule, CommitHypothesesModule, ContextAxiomModule, ContextAxiomModule, ContextCarrierSetModule, ContextCommitHypothesesModule, ContextCommitIdentsModule, ContextConstantModule, ContextExtendsModule, ContextHypothesesModule, ContextModule, ContextModule, ContextPointerModule, ExpressionModule, FwdMachineCommitHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventActionBodySimModule, FwdMachineEventActionFrameSimModule, FwdMachineEventActionModule, FwdMachineEventCommitHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventGuardModule, FwdMachineEventHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventModule, FwdMachineEventStrengthenGuardModule, FwdMachineEventVariantModule, FwdMachineEventWitnessModule, FwdMachineHypothesesModule, FwdMachineInvariantModule, FwdMachineNewEventInvariantModule, FwdMachineRefEventInvariantModule, FwdMachineRefinementModule, FwdMachineVariantModule, GlobalHypothesesModule, IdentifierCreatorModule, IdentifierModule, LabeledElementModule, LabeledFormulaModule, MachineCommitIdentsModule, MachineContextClosureModule, MachineEventActionModule, MachineEventActionUtilityModule, MachineEventCommitIdentsModule, MachineEventCommitRefinesModule, MachineEventCopyActionsModule, MachineEventCopyGuardsModule, MachineEventCopyLabeledElementsModule, MachineEventCopyParametersModule, MachineEventGuardModule, MachineEventInvariantModule, MachineEventModule, MachineEventParameterModule, MachineEventRefinementModule, MachineEventWitnessModule, MachineInvariantModule, MachineModule, MachineModule, MachineRefinesModule, MachineSeesContextModule, MachineVariableModule, MachineVariantModule, POGProcessorModule, PredicateModule, PredicateModule, PredicateWithTypingModule, SCProcessorModule, UtilityModule
public interface IProcessorModule extends IModule
Basic type for processor modules. A processor module is one of the two kinds of modules (IModule) used by a core tool.

Processor modules are intended to process a list of elements. It is implemented by the static checker and the proof obligation generator.

A processor module may have filter and processor child modules. The filter child nodes are executed before the processor child modules.

Since:
3.0
